name: badge
description: A small status indicator with multiple style variants. Used for tags, statuses, and categorization.

ai.whenToUse: Use for status indicators, tags, counts, categories. Place next to headings, in lists, or in table cells.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for interactive actions (use Button). Don't use for long text content.
commonMistakes: Using destructive variant for non-error states
ai.accessibilityNotes: Purely decorative by default. Add role='status' for dynamic status badges.
